chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD Cr. Bail Application No.S-471 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) For hearing of main case. 29.08.2022. Applicants are present on ad-interim pre-arrest bail. Mr. Imdad Ali Memon, Advocate for applicants. Mr. Muhammad Hassan Chang, Advocate holds brief for Mr. Nouman Sahito, Advocate for complainant. Ms. Sana Memon, Assistant P.G. O R D E R MUHAMMAD IQBAL KALHORO, J- FIR against applicants was registered, among others, under Section 324 PPC on 18.03.2022 of an incident which occurred on 10.03.2022 in which applicants are alleged to have caused injuries to complainant Muhammad Rafique which as per medical evidence are bailable, falling under Section 337-A(i) PPC and 337-F(i) PPC. The pre-arrest bail application of the applicants was dismissed only because Section 324 PPC was mentioned in FIR. However, subsequently by an order dated 26.07.2022 on an application of the applicants, the said section has been deleted and now all the sections against the applicants are bailable. In the circumstances, learned A.P.G has not opposed bail. 2. Accordingly, and in view of above, application is allowed and ad-interim pre-arrest already granted to the applicants is hereby confirmed on same terms and conditions. 3. The observations made hereinabove are tentative in nature and shall not influence the trial Court while deciding the case on merits. JUDGE Shahid
